scoring_rubric.description: 0-100 composite score. Higher = better deal. Gem threshold: 78+ (revised down from 85 based on observed market — best realistic S scores ~80-83).

color_match.rules: Black/Dark grey=15, Dark blue/green=13, Silver/grey=8, Light/other=5

mod_readiness.rules: Steel springs+dark color+under budget=10, Steel+budget=7, Air susp=-10 REJECT

alert_thresholds.78_plus: 🚨 HIGH ALERT — GEM. Move immediately. Expected shelf life: <24h.
alert_thresholds.70_to_77: ⚡ HOT LEAD. Act within hours. Likely <24-48h shelf life.
alert_thresholds.60_to_69: ⚠️ Watch. May linger but verify suspension/condition.
alert_thresholds.below_60: 🐢 Low priority / skip if air suspension.

alert_triggers: Sub-100k km Cayenne S under €8,000 appears

market_velocity._note: Running average days-on-market per score band. Updated whenever listings are confirmed removed/sold. Only updated on successful Chrome scans (not CHROME_NOT_CONNECTED events). Relists (same car, new ID) are NOT counted as sales.
market_velocity.insight: 4 listings confirmed gone today. Score <60 band now avg 2.8d (4 samples). Score 60-69 avg 2.2d. NEW #1 candidate: 451096927 (Black, Scheckheft, 135k km, €6,999, score 72). Still tracking 450540613 (score 75) as top pick.

450540613.title: Cayenne S — Kaiserslautern (Low KM) [RELIST of 441672094]
450540613.relist_note: RELISTED: Original ID 441672094 showed 'nicht mehr verfügbar' on 2026-03-18 but same car appeared as 450540613 same day. Dealer refreshed the listing ID to appear 'new' in sort order. Car has been on market effectively 3 days now.
450540613.urgency_note: ⚠️ HOT: avg shelf life ~4.0d. Act within hours.
450540613.notes: Lowest mileage S on the market (127k km). Dealer relisted under new ID to appear fresh. Being active 3+ days = mild leverage for negotiation. Still the best mileage play after Kall (if Kall engine issue is real). Must confirm Unfallfrei. G-Automobile 3.4★ — negotiate firmly.

449623949.title: Cayenne S — Bielefeld (Basaltschwarz, AIR SUSP) ⛔ SKIP
449623949.recommendation: SKIP — Luftfederung confirmed in equipment list. TÜV 03/2026 = already at limit/expired. Price + €1,200 = €7,150 = just under €7,500 exception threshold, but with expired TÜV this doesn't work.
449623949.notes: SKIP. Luftfederung explicitly in equipment list. Beautiful Basaltschwarz paint + Unfallfrei is attractive but air suspension kills it. TÜV listed as 03/2026 = this month or already expired. Multiple good extras (Bi-Xenon, Schiebedach, 2-zone climate) but they don't help with the suspension problem.

450012443.title: Cayenne S — Waiblingen (Black, Air Susp) ⛔ SKIP
450012443.seller: Private — current owner since 2012, but 5 total owners
450012443.recommendation: SKIP — air suspension disqualifies at this price. Only reconsider if price drops to €4,500–€5,000.
450012443.notes: SKIP. Air suspension = guaranteed future €800-1500 repair. 3 days active with no action confirms our model. Still priced at €6,300 = not priced in.
known_defects: AIR SUSPENSION — primary disqualifier, future cost €800-1500
PCM center screen defective (€150 used replacement)

450515114.title: Cayenne S — Remscheid (Green, Air Susp) ⛔ SKIP
450515114.recommendation: SKIP — air suspension confirmed. CEL on. Price + €1,200 = €7,500 = borderline, but CEL + broken sensors make it not worth it.
450515114.urgency_note: 🚫 SKIP unless price drops to fund steel conversion.
450515114.notes: SKIP. Luftfederung + check engine light (lambda sensor) + reverse sensor broken. Could reconsider only at ~€5,000 to pre-fund steel conversion + repairs. Price drop: €6300 → €5,990 on 2026-03-24.
known_defects: Check engine light ON — Lambda sensor faulty
Non-original catalytic converter not recognized by ECU

449099292.title: Cayenne S — Neuenstein (Black, Full History) 🏅 Best Negotiation Play
449099292.urgency_note: 👀 Monitor. Typically lasts ~2.2d at this score.
449099292.notes: BEST NEGOTIATION PLAY on market. Perfect condition profile: Unfallfrei + Scheckheft + Black + 158.5k km + TÜV 08/2027. Score 69 at asking €9,500 but has been on market 17+ DAYS — strong leverage. Seller explicitly said "price only negotiable in person" = they have room. Known minor issues: Leuchtweitenregulierung warning (says it works fine), glove box doesn't open (minor). 4 owners. Rich spec: 4-zone climate, surround camera, sunroof, Apple CarPlay, DAB. Could be related to old Neuenstein listing (447489282) or genuinely older listing from before our tracking started. Target: visit, inspect, offer €7,500-8,000.

450506496.title: Cayenne S — Haiger (Black, TÜV 07/2027)
450506496.urgency_note: 👀 Monitor. Typically lasts ~2.2d at this score.
450506496.notes: Black, TÜV 07/2027 (good). Fresh work done: tires, brake pads, spark plugs, battery, starter motor, oil change, tow hitch. DEREGISTERED (Abgemeldet). Known defects: coolant expansion tank leaking (€50-150 fix), panoramic sunroof not working (covered with protective film). No Unfallfrei, no Scheckheft. 209k km is high. Haiger is ~1h north of Frankfurt.
known_defects: Kühlmittelausgleichsbehälter undicht — coolant expansion tank leaking (cheap fix)
Panoramadach ohne Funktion — sunroof dead, covered with film

450612922.title: Cayenne S — Heide (Black, Scheckheft, TÜV 07/2027)
450612922.urgency_note: 👀 Monitor. Typically lasts ~2.2d at this score.
450612922.notes: Black, Scheckheft, TÜV 07/2027, garage-kept. Seller says no Wartungsstau, good paint condition, recent oil service, new all-season tires, 20" wheels. Defect: tailgate latch only opens manually (must hold while loading). No Unfallfrei declared. 243.5k km is high drag on score. Far north Germany (Schleswig-Holstein). Price of €6,900 is high for 243k km.
known_defects: Kofferraumklappe öffnet nur manuell — tailgate latch broken (€20-50 fix)

450607597.title: Cayenne S — Filderstadt (Black Wrapped, Unfallfrei, TÜV 03/2028)
450607597.urgency_note: 👀 Monitor. Typically lasts ~2.2d at this score.
450607597.notes: Black (wrapped — silver parts extensively foiled black), Unfallfrei, TÜV 03/2028, Youngtimerversicherung möglich (€230/yr). Fresh tires (Ganzjahresreifen). Known defects: Navi ohne Funktion, CD drive broken, Leuchtweitenregelung warning (says functional). €8,950 is aggressive for 190k km private. No Scheckheft. Filderstadt is south of Stuttgart. Could negotiate to €7,500-8,000.
known_defects: Silver body parts wrapped black — unclear condition underneath

450471027.title: Cayenne S — Jevenstedt (Green, Bastlerfahrzeug)
450471027.notes: Bastlerfahrzeug (project/DIY car). Green exterior, beige interior. "The car drives, brakes and steers exactly as a car should." Honest seller. Known issues: headlights must be replaced for next TÜV, tires must be replaced. TÜV 06/2026 = 3 months. Only 1 key. 252k km. Jevenstedt is in Schleswig-Holstein, ~30min west of Kiel. Cheap V8 fun or parts source.
known_defects: Scheinwerfer müssen erneuert werden — headlights need replacing for TÜV
Reifen müssen erneuert werden — tires need replacing for TÜV

450913188.title: Cayenne S — Kehl (Black, 200k km) ⚠️ WATCH
450913188.urgency_note: 👀 Monitor. Typically lasts ~2.2d at this score.
450913188.notes: NEW #1 CANDIDATE. BLACK + Scheckheftgepflegt + €4,500 + 200k km. Score 68 conservatively (no explicit Unfallfrei). If Unfallfrei is true = 25+4+20+15+6+10 = 80 → GEM territory. Call seller to confirm Unfallfrei status. Steel springs confirmed (no Luftfederung). Spanish documentation possible (near French/German border).

450976040.title: Cayenne S — Grünwald (Dark Blue, 227k km, 2nd owner)
450976040.urgency_note: 👀 Monitor. Typically lasts ~2.2d at this score.
450976040.notes: 2nd owner (zweiter Hand). Seller describes 'elegantes Dunkelblau' = dark blue, great for mods. TÜV expired but included in price. Currently deregistered (abgemeldet). No Unfallfrei mentioned. 2003 = oldest gen. Worth negotiating down to €5,200-5,500.

450951091.title: Cayenne S — Salzgitter (TechArt Luftfahrwerk) ❌ AIR SUSP
450951091.urgency_note: 🚫 SKIP unless price drops to fund steel conversion.
450951091.notes: TechArt air suspension. Title: 'TechArt Luftfahrwerk'. Auto-rejected.

450933159.title: Cayenne S — Marktredwitz (Blau Metallic, Unfallfrei) ❌ AIR SUSP
450933159.urgency_note: 🚫 SKIP unless price drops to fund steel conversion.
450933159.notes: Tempting: Unfallfrei + Scheckheft + Blau Metallic + TÜV 11/2026 + negotiable. But Luftfederung in equipment list. 3 owners. €6,900+€1,200=€8,100 > budget. SKIP.

451096927.title: Porsche Cayenne S Scheckheftgepflegt
451096927.known_issues: Abblendlicht warning, Kurvenlicht warning, slow tailgate, AC noise at full blast
451096927.urgency_note: ⚠️ HOT: avg shelf life ~4.0d. Act within hours.
451096927.notes: Best new find this scan. Black, Scheckheft, 135k km, steel springs likely. 5 owners is a concern. Minor electrical warnings. Manual check recommended.

451015573.title: Porsche Cayenne S
451015573.urgency_note: 🚫 SKIP — air suspension, price too high for steel conversion.

449966601.title: Porsche Cayenne S
449966601.urgency_note: 🚫 SKIP — air suspension, price too high for steel conversion.
449966601.notes: Air suspension auto-reject. Unfallfrei, 3 owners, good condition otherwise. €7,490 + €1,200 = €8,690 >> €7,500.

451105460.title: Porsche Cayenne S 4.5 V8 Top Zustand Scheckheftgepflegt
451105460.urgency_note: 👀 Monitor. Typically lasts ~2.2d at this score.
451105460.notes: RARE manual transmission! Silver color hurts score. Scheckheft, well-equipped. Vollausstattung claimed.

451165610.title: Porsche Cayenne S
451165610.notes: Same Neuenstein location as 449099292 — possibly same seller. Scheckheft, Black, good mileage but €9,250 is too high.

446626097.title: Porsche Cayenne S

451147493.notes: Bare-bones listing. 'Lenkt, fährt, bremst.' Worn brakes from standing. No HU listed.

451141935.title: Porsche Cayenne S
451141935.known_issues: Wasserpumpe defekt (water pump broken), Hydrostöße (hydraulic lifter issues)
451141935.urgency_note: 🐢 Low priority. Broken — needs water pump + lifters.
451141935.notes: Project car. Water pump broken, hydraulic lifter issues. No exterior photos. Parts car pricing.

451109350.title: Porsche Cayenne S

448717120.title: Porsche Cayenne S

451056533.title: Porsche Cayenne S

444224404.title: Cayenne S — München (Black, Unfallfrei, 5★ Dealer) ⛔ AIR SUSPENSION
444224404.recommendation: SKIP — Luftfederung confirmed. Price €4,990 + €1,200 = €6,190 < €7,500 exception threshold, but at 232k km this suspension will need work. Pass unless price drops to ~€3,500.
444224404.notes: SKIP. Temptingly good deal on paper (Unfallfrei + Autowelt Kaufmann 5★/151 reviews + Black Metallic + €4,990) but Luftfederung is confirmed in equipment list. Last service April 2023 at 205,545km. TÜV 01/2027. Could reconsider at ~€3,500 (suspension already priced in at that point). Dealer has Inzahlungnahme option.

450788630.title: Cayenne S — Berg-am-Laim (Black, 210k km) ⚠️ Watch
450788630.urgency_note: 👀 Monitor. Typically lasts ~2.2d at this score.
450788630.notes: Black with valid TÜV until 12/2026. 210k km. No condition info in listing. Worth a call to verify Unfallfrei. Berg-am-Laim = München area, accessible. Title mentions 'V8/340PS/Zoll/Tüv'.

450971944.title: Cayenne S — Strasbourg/Kehl (Grey, 265k km, €3,490, French reg)
450971944.notes: French registration (Strasbourg area). 'Französische Zulassung. Besichtigung in Straßburg möglich.' TÜV 03/2027 is good. Cross-border import adds complexity. Skip unless no alternatives.

451000540.title: Cayenne S — Paderborn (296k km, €3,999)
451000540.notes: 'Voll Fahrbereit' (fully driveable) — usually means something needs attention. 296k km at €3,999. Low priority unless inspected.

alerts_log.message: Chrome extension was not connected when the 9:07 AM scan fired. mobile.de works fine via Chrome. The issue: user's browser wasn't open. WebFetch/brave-search tried as fallbacks but go through the VM proxy — not valid for this task.
ALERT: #1 pick (449498498 Leipzig, score 82, €5,980) is SOLD. Confirmed gone. Sold within ~24h of first listing. Market is active — do not sleep on high-score listings.

4 out of 6 tracked listings removed overnight (449498498, 449965549, 449102289, 447489282). 2 remain active: Kaiserslautern (441672094, score 75) and Waiblingen skip (450012443). 2 new S listings added. Market clearing quickly.
Tracker updated to v1.1: gem_threshold lowered from 85 to 78; market_velocity section added; urgency_note added to active listings.
🚨 NEW GEM CANDIDATE: 450414438 (Kall, €4,500, 146k km, Black) scores 79. Engine caveat requires phone call first. If engine issue is minor, this is the best listing seen in this hunt. ACT FAST.

450531020 (TechArt, €6,999, score 51) gone after 1 day. Adds data point to score_below_60 velocity band (1 day).

Evening scan complete. 23 listing IDs on page 1. All 7 active listings confirmed still live. 7 new Cayenne S listings added (scores 55-69). No new gems.
